creator: tinkae.kel@gmail.com
text:
For now, there is no chapter about IPFW in russian handbook. In .ru net exists some translations of this chapter, but they are pretty poor and comlicated for perception.

Fix: With collegue we've done this job for our internal use. In my opinion, it sounds not bad we're ready to send our version of chapter on russian language. 
File with a translation attached.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Go to http://www.freebsd.org/doc/ru_RU.KOI8-R/books/handbook/firewalls-ipfw.html
There is no russian chapter about IPFW
